takeaways: MU up 70% YTD — HBM4 mass production started, sold out through 2026, DA Davidson targets $1,000
AVGO AI revenue +106% YoY to $8.4B in Q1; CEO guides $100B+ annual AI chip revenue by 2028
ALAB Q1 revenue $308M (+93% YoY), Q2 guided to $365M — PCIe 6 ramp driving upside
MRVL +67% in April alone — NVIDIA $2B strategic investment, Google TPU talks confirmed
PLTR Q1 revenue $1.63B (+85% YoY), U.S. Army $10B contract; raised 2026 guide to $7.65B
SMCI Q3 EPS beat $0.84 vs $0.62 est; $38.9-40.4B FY2026 guidance, but legal overhang persists
MSFT Azure +40% YoY, annualized AI revenue $37B (+123%); stock -12% YTD on capex concerns
ADBE down 37-46% from peak — Firefly ARR $250M+, AI-first ARR 3x YoY, but CEO transition risk
BTC consolidating $80-85K range; prediction markets favor $85K by end of May
SQQQ+QQQ and BITI+BTC are self-cancelling pairs — review before next deployment of cash
risk_flags: AI concentration: MU+AVGO+ALAB+MRVL+SMCI+PLTR = 6 of 10 stocks in same AI supercycle — one sector rotation wipes the book
SQQQ ($827) held alongside QQQ ($2,327) — daily decay on 3x inverse will erode SQQQ value in any sideways or up market
BITI ($257) held alongside BTC ($5,628) — inverse futures ETF decays over time and cancels BTC upside
SMCI legal risk: co-founder smuggling allegations, revenue recognition delays, down 77% from ATH
ADBE CEO transition + AI disruption risk from Canva/Sora — down 43-46% from peak, thesis under pressure
MSFT capex $190B guided 2026 — market concerned about AI ROI timeline despite strong Azure growth
$43,501 cash (65%) — large uninvested position losing real return vs inflation; opportunity cost rising

items.thesis: Pure-play AI memory — HBM4 sold out through 2026, HBM4e ramp in 2027. Record Q2 revenue $23.9B (+196% YoY). DA Davidson $1,000 PT.
items.bull: Sold out of HBM for quarters; 1γ node power advantage; $73.9B FY2026 revenue est (+98%)
items.bear: Memory is cyclical; DRAM oversupply risk if AI capex slows; Samsung/SK Hynix competition

latest_news.title: MU up 70% in 2026 — analysts still see more upside on HBM4 supercycle

items.thesis: AI custom silicon (XPUs) + Ethernet networking for hyperscalers. Q1 AI revenue $8.4B (+106%). CEO guides $100B+ AI chip revenue by 2028.
items.bull: 48 of 50 analysts Buy/Strong Buy; $40-50B AI revenue 2026E; dominant in custom ASIC + networking
items.bear: Valuation rich; hyperscaler capex concentration risk; VMware integration execution

latest_news.title: Broadcom AI revenue rockets 106% to $8.4B — custom silicon dominates infrastructure build-out

items.thesis: Pure-play AI fabric connectivity — PCIe 6, CXL, NVLink Fusion. Q1 $308M (+93% YoY). Q2 guided $365M. Only independent AI connectivity pure-play.
items.bull: Only public pure-play on AI rack connectivity; PCIe 6 ramp just starting; deep hyperscaler partnerships
items.bear: Small cap, illiquid; hyperscaler vertical integration risk; premium valuation

latest_news.title: ALAB Q1 2026: $308M revenue +93% YoY, Q2 guided $365M on PCIe 6 ramp

items.thesis: Custom AI silicon for Amazon/Microsoft/Google + optical networking. NVIDIA $2B investment validates roadmap. +67% in April on Google TPU deal talks.
items.bull: $2B NVIDIA investment; Google TPU talks; 18 cloud design wins; $8.2B revenue FY2026 (+42%)
items.bear: Custom silicon timelines slip; margins below AVGO; depends on 2-3 hyperscaler relationships

latest_news.title: MRVL +67% in April: Google TPU talks and NVIDIA $2B investment confirm custom silicon thesis

items.thesis: AIP (AI Platform) capturing U.S. government + commercial spend. Q1 +85% YoY, U.S. Army $10B/10yr contract. 2026 revenue guide raised to $7.65B (+71%).
items.bull: Government AI monopoly position; commercial AIP accelerating; 51% profit margins
items.bear: Rich valuation (100x+ revenue); stock -18% YTD; geopolitical risk; CEO concentration risk

items.bull: 6,000 racks/month capacity by FY2026 end; $13B+ Blackwell Ultra orders; liquid cooling scale
items.bear: Down 77% from ATH; co-founder smuggling allegations; revenue recognition delays; audit risk

items.thesis: Azure AI infrastructure + Copilot ecosystem. Annualized AI revenue $37B (+123%). Azure +40% YoY. But stock -12% YTD on $190B capex guidance concern.
items.bull: AI revenue compounding 100%+ YoY; Copilot enterprise adoption accelerating; Azure #2 cloud
items.bear: $190B capex 2026 — investors worried about AI ROI timing; stock -12% YTD on spending fear

items.thesis: Firefly AI monetization building ($250M ARR, 3x YoY). Acrobat AI Assistant 3x YoY. But -37-46% from peak on Canva/Sora disruption fear + CEO transition.

items.thesis: Consolidating $80-85K. Prediction markets favor $85K by end of May. Wide 2026 range $70K-$110K. Post-halving supply dynamics supportive.
items.bull: Post-halving supply squeeze; institutional ETF inflows via IBIT; $85-100K near-term targets
items.bear: Regulatory risk; macro tightening; correlation to risk assets in selloffs; BITI position hedges upside

items.thesis: HELD ALONGSIDE QQQ — contradictory position. SQQQ decays daily vs QQQ in any flat/up market. Review intent: active hedge or legacy position?
items.bull: Provides downside protection if Nasdaq drops sharply (e.g. -30%+ scenario)
items.bear: Daily decay mechanism erodes value continuously; held with QQQ = paying for hedge that cancels gains

latest_news.title: SQQQ+QQQ: self-cancelling pair — daily decay on 3x inverse destroys value in sideways markets

items.thesis: HELD ALONGSIDE BTC — contradictory position. BITI uses futures and decays. Effectively neutralises $5,628 BTC position. Review intent.
items.bull: Provides BTC crash protection for the $257 cost
items.bear: Futures-based ETF with decay; $257 BITI vs $5,628 BTC = asymmetric drag; costs premium even when BTC flat

latest_news.title: Inverse ETF risks: BITI futures decay means losses even when BTC moves sideways
